message:
fix(store,runtime,server): keyspace notification correctness and CLIENT PAUSE starvation

Keyspace notifications:
- Use logical key (not physical DB-prefixed key) in expired/evicted notifications
- Add missing expired notifications in run_active_expire_cycle
- RENAME/RENAMENX: emit rename_from on source, rename_to on destination

CLIENT PAUSE:
- Track paused clients and re-trigger readable processing when pause expires,
  preventing indefinite starvation due to mio edge-triggered I/O

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
